assertions.description: No identification of the ECP5 FPGA (U1) as the central hub connecting USB, RF, memory, and debug subsystems
USB3343-CP (U9) is a USB PHY not just a generic IC - its role in USB signal path (FPGA <-> PHY <-> USB connector) should be noted
No JTAG/debug bus detection despite signals like TMS, TCK, TDI, TDO being present for FPGA programming
DAC output path through opamp filter to mixer not traced as a signal chain
HyperRAM interface operating at high speed deserves signal integrity notes (series termination, etc.)
REVIEW: LMV358 opamp circuits both classified as comparator_or_open_loop but one is likely a Sallen-Key active filter (typical in baseband signal conditioning for SDR)
REVIEW: UART bus analysis reports 66 entries which is far too many - appears to be matching any 2-pin net as UART, including power nets like 3V3RX
REVIEW: TX_MIX_CTRL.SDATA and RX_MIX_CTRL.SDATA detected as I2C SDA but these are RFFC5072 SPI-like control bus data lines
REVIEW: Crystal Y1 (TCXO) detected with no frequency - should parse the value or connected IC to determine frequency
REVIEW: RF chain amplifiers list is empty despite design having baseband amplifier paths and gain stages
REVIEW: Missing regulator input cap flagged for U24 (LDO-ADJ) input rail __unnamed_82 but this is likely connected through the hierarchical sheet
